name: Crispy Honey Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a cookie sheet with waxed paper.
2. In a large saucepan, combine the honey and butter. Bring to a boil; boil for 2 minutes.
3. Add the cornflakes and peanuts; stir until well coated.
4. Drop by rounded tablespoonfuls onto the lined cookie sheet.
5. Cool slightly; reshape if necessary.
6. Refrigerate until set. Serve chilled. Store in the refrigerator.
